verses.1: A Song of Ascents, of David. “Had it not been the LORD who was on our side,” Let Israel say,
verses.2: “Had it not been the LORD who was on our side When people rose up against us,
verses.3: Then they would have swallowed us alive, When their anger was kindled against us;
verses.4: Then the waters would have flooded over us, The stream would have swept over our souls;
verses.5: Then the raging waters would have swept over our souls.”
verses.6: Blessed be the LORD, Who has not given us to be torn by their teeth.
verses.7: Our souls have escaped like a bird from the trapper’s snare; The snare is broken and we have escaped.
verses.8: Our help is in the name of the LORD, Who made heaven and earth.
